title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: WILLAMINA HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1100 NE Oaken Hills Drive Willamina, OR 97396 Eligibility: Students enrolled in the Grand Ronde, Sheridan, and Willamina school districts Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-5pm (503) 876-8564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 876-8564 Main phone Main phone (503) 876-8564 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLAMINA HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
